prompt: The 21-4192 Employment Information form at src/applications/benefits-optimization-aquia/21-4192-employment-information already has a prefillTransformer that returns ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName nested under personalInfo (e.g., personalInfo.ssn, personalInfo.fullName). I want to add the profilePersonalInfoPage from the prefill pattern. Can you set it up?
assertions: Does NOT modify the existing prefillTransformer (it already provides ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName)
Adds profilePersonalInfoPage to a chapter in formConfig
Configures a dataAdapter with ssnPath and vaFileNumberPath pointing to the nested locations under personalInfo
Does not break existing form chapters or page definitions
quality_bonuses: Explains that the existing transformer already provides all required fields so no modification is needed
Uses the correct nested paths in dataAdapter (personalInfo.ssn, personalInfo.vaFileNumber)
